title: malva oxyloba
intro: Malva oxyloba, also known as Oxylobus or Small Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Malva oxyloba include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Malva oxyloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and inflorescence extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
